coreTruthSet.description: Core blind spot is inability to perceive systemic failure or irreversible rupture in the current stage.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Cannot perceive system failure ... no framework for true rupture.

coreTruthSet.description: Primary decision filter is rhythmic alignment (join vs force), with anti-patterns including disruption initiation and control-seeking.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: "Does this align with the existing rhythm?" ... She enters systems correctly.

coreTruthSet.description: Scene 1 first-matriarch mode is environmental integration: she feels pressure/rhythm/flow/alignment before analytical interpretation.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: Environmental Integration (She Feels Before She Thinks) ... pressure, rhythm, flow, alignment.

coreTruthSet.description: The chunk defines a POV layering architecture with perception channel, decision filter, blind spot, and growth evolution as core scene design primitives.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: POV LAYERING SYSTEM ... primary perception channel ... decision filter ... blind spot ... growth evolution.

coreTruthSet.description: Scene symbol lock ties river to truth/alignment, establishing future stress when systems become unreadable or non-river-like.
coreTruthSet.quoteExcerpt: RIVER = TRUTH / ALIGNMENT ... she will struggle when the system becomes unstable or unreadable.

settingAnchors.name: Scene 1 Threshold Alignment Space
settingAnchors.description: Perceptual threshold space where identity transition is read through pressure, air, stillness, and movement shifts.

continuityConstraints.title: Feel-Before-Think POV Rule
continuityConstraints.text: First-matriarch POV prioritizes body sensation and rhythm before visual detail or abstract interpretation.

continuityConstraints.title: Adjust-Not-Initiate Behavior Rule
continuityConstraints.text: Micro-behavior in early scenes must show pausing, mirroring, and adjustment rather than initiation or interpretation rush.

continuityConstraints.title: Present-Sensory Internal Language
continuityConstraints.text: Internal narration should avoid abstract projection and explanation, favoring present-sensory physical metaphor.

openResearchGaps.title: How should daughter POV layering contrast with first-matriarch mode while preserving lineage continuity?
openResearchGaps.description: Needed to build intergenerational voice distinction without breaking thematic cohesion.

openResearchGaps.description: Needed for consistent editorial QA of perception/voice mechanics.
